benefits.p: Sage provides polyphenols, including rosmarinic acid and flavonoids, which help protect cells from oxidative stress. These antioxidant compounds contribute to the body's normal defence against everyday oxidative damage.
Human studies suggest sage extracts may support aspects of memory and attention, although evidence is still limited and appears to depend on the preparation and dose used.
Sage contains vitamin K, which contributes to normal blood clotting and the maintenance of healthy bones. Although typically consumed in small amounts, it can contribute to overall dietary intake.

ref.s: NIH Office of Dietary Supplements – Vitamin K

benefits.p: A rich source of marine omega-3 fatty acids, which have consistently been associated with cardiovascular health and normal brain function in human studies. Sardines provide substantial amounts of EPA and DHA in a small serving.

ref.s: Harvard T.H. Chan School of Public Health

benefits.p: Sardines provide complete protein containing all essential amino acids. Adequate protein intake supports maintenance of muscle mass, healthy ageing, and overall body function.
Sardines are one of the few foods that naturally provide meaningful amounts of vitamin D. This nutrient supports calcium absorption, bone health, and normal immune function.

When eaten with their soft edible bones, sardines provide substantial amounts of calcium that supports normal bone and muscle function. This makes them an excellent dairy-free source of this essential mineral.

Traditional sourdough fermentation can reduce the glycaemic impact of bread compared with some conventionally leavened breads. The effect depends on the flour used, fermentation method and final recipe.

Natural fermentation reduces phytate, helping improve the bioavailability of minerals such as iron, zinc and magnesium. Wholegrain sourdough generally provides greater mineral and fibre content than refined varieties.
Sourdough made with wholegrain flour provides complex carbohydrates and dietary fibre that contribute to digestive health and sustained energy intake as part of a balanced diet.
